author: codex-dup-audit

patch.value: Extract shared legacy settings test fixtures

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: jscpd found tests/unit/settings-store.spec.ts repeats large legacy settings JSON fixtures inside the same spec. Representative clone: settings-store.spec.ts:82-104 vs settings-store.spec.ts:251-273, with repeated output/search/providers/vector_store defaults plus only small workflow/item_format scenario differences. Existing pm-v798 covers production item-type normalization and pm-axd1 covers extension policy defaults, but no active item covers settings-store fixture duplication. Fix by adding a local helper such as writeLegacySettings(pmRoot, overrides) or legacySettingsFixture(overrides), so tests express only the missing/explicit fields under test.

settings-store specs use a shared legacy settings fixture builder with explicit per-test overrides; behavior under test remains visible for omitted workflow and item_format metadata cases; settings-store tests and pnpm build pass.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for settings-store fixtures

value.author: codex-dup-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: before creating, searched existing items for settings-store legacy settings fixtures and readSettingsWithMetadata duplication. Relevant open items pm-v798 and pm-axd1 cover production normalization/defaults, not repeated settings-store test JSON. jscpd and manual inspection confirmed settings-store.spec.ts:82-104 duplicates settings-store.spec.ts:251-273.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Added local helpers legacySettingsFixture(overrides) + writeLegacySettings(pmRoot, overrides) to settings-store.spec.ts. Base fixture omits later-added keys (workflow/item_format) so each test expresses only its scenario: 'merges defaults when legacy settings omit workflow' uses the bare base (no overrides); 'reports whether item_format was explicitly selected' adds { workflow: { definition_of_done: [] } } as an override. Both fixtures previously duplicated ~28 lines of output/search/providers/vector_store defaults; now collapsed to one builder. Key order in the written JSON for the second test changes (workflow now last) but both tests only JSON.parse via readSettings/readSettingsWithMetadata (order-independent); no raw-order assertion exists. 11 tests pass; build green. No assertion changes.

patch.value: Added legacySettingsFixture(overrides) + writeLegacySettings(pmRoot, overrides) helpers in settings-store.spec.ts; migrated the workflow-omit and item_format-explicitness tests so each expresses only its scenario field via overrides. 11 tests pass; build green.
Extracted shared legacy settings test fixtures (legacySettingsFixture/writeLegacySettings); migrated duplicated fixtures; 11 tests pass, build green.
Legacy settings test fixtures are centralized without changing settings behavior.
Shared settings-store fixtures are in place and full release gate passed after the combined dedup refactor.
